Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 304 [quitclaim][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[u₂]-il₃-ti₃-MEŠ ša₂ ŠE.BAR ⸢KU₃⸣.BABBAR ša₂

(o 1) Contract-tablets of barley (and) silver of all the previous credits (from) Balaṭu, son of Šamaš-iddin, son of Anu-balassu-iqbi, which Ubar, son of Anu-ahhe-iqiša, has taken over on account of the house of Šamaš-iddin, son of Anu-balassu-iqbi, are paid.

o 22

⸢IGI?tu mi?-im?⸣-ma ra-šu-tu mba-la-⸢ṭu⸣

o 33

⸢DUMU ša₂⸣ [m]dUTU—MU DUMU ša₂ md60—DIN-su—E1

o 44

ša₂ ina muḫ-ḫi mu₂-bar DUMU ša₂2

o 55

⸢m⸣d60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—BAša₂ ša₂ ina E₂

o 66

[m]dUTU—MU DUMU <ša₂> md60—⸢DIN⸣-su—E

o 77

[il]-la-an-ni e-ṭir-MEŠ ši-na

Reverse
r 1r 1

lu₂mu-kin-nu mza!-kir DUMU ša₂

(r 1) Witnesses: Zakir, son of Anu-šum-iddin; Anu-ana-bitišu, son of Anu-balassu-iqbi; Anu-ah-ittannu, son of Labaši; Labaši, son of Ibni-Ištar; Labaši, son of Nidinti-Anu.

r 22

md60—MU—MU m!d60—ana—E₂-šu₂ DUMU ša₂

r 33

⸢m⸣d60—DIN-su—E md60—ŠEŠ—it-tan-nu

r 44

DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši mla-ba-ši

r 55

DUMU ša₂ mDU₂—dINANA mla-ba-ši

r 66

DUMU ša₂ mni-din-ti—d60

(1 line blank)
r 77

lu₂UMBISAG mARAD-ia DUMU ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU

(r 7) Scribe: Ardiya, son of Anu-ahhe-iddin. Uruk, the month Simanu, 23rd day, 2nd year of PN, king of all the lands.

r 88

UNUGki itiSIG₄ U₄ 23-KAM₂

t.e. 1t.e. 1

MU 2-KAM₂ <...> LUGAL KUR.KUR

na₄KIŠIB

(b.e. 1) Seal of Šamaš-iddin.

md⸢UTU—MU⸣
